name: Ashley Graves - Your... Erm... Stepsister
description:
(AU Stepsister) Leyley wants to get laidlaid while during the covid 19 quarantine.

Made for those people that want to relive the glorious days when they didn't have to bemoan their non existent social life while also wanting to be locked in with a crazy bitch for some reason.


A card I made a long ago and never uploaded. I tried my best to preserve the character, but had to change some stuff.

Note: All characters including {{user}} are above the age of 18.
creator: Asper111
